title: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada’s funding opportunities and initiatives - Canada.ca

Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada

## Funding opportunities and initiatives
Discover the funding opportunities available to support immigration in Canada.
Funding for services to help newcomers settle and adapt to life in Canada

## Francophone Immigration Support Program (FISP)
Funding for innovative projects to increase collaboration and the promotion of Francophone minority communities
